nodes.categoryHTML:
Platforms and Software Resources

Urban Planning Tools and Platforms
nodes.itemHTML: • ArcGIS Urban - ArcGIS Urban enables planners and design professionals to publish living plans and collaborate across teams with a web-based 3D application that supports scenario planning and impact assessment.

• Model Maker - A transfer learning library that simplifies the process of training, evaluation and deployment for TensorFlow Lite models (support: Image Classification, Object Detection, Text Classification, BERT Question Answer, Audio Classification, Recommendation etc.; API reference).
• cstars0 - Adds some git shortcuts.
• posh-git-bashstars316 - Adds git status in your prompt.
• Synthstars402 - Open Source test data generator.

Network Programming with Go

Network Programming with Go will help you leverage Go to write secure, readable, production-ready network code. Network Programming with Go is all you'll need to take advantage of Go's built-in concurrency, rapid compiling, and rich standard library.
• Beekeeper Studiostars5.9k - Open Source SQL Editor and Database Manager with a privacy commitment in their mission statement.
• golem - A framework for building production-grade Shiny apps.
• httpgdstars105 - Asynchronous http server graphics device for R.
• corporaexplorer - Dynamic exploration of text collections
• canustars466 - A single molecule sequence assembler for genomes large and small.
• flyestars415 - De novo assembler for single molecule sequencing reads using repeat graphs.
• hifiasmstars166 - A haplotype-resolved assembler for accurate Hifi reads.
• wtdbg2stars420 - A fuzzy Bruijn graph approach to long noisy reads assembly
• Splunk App for Cordastars0 - Splunk official integration app for Corda monitoring.
• Conveyal's gtfs-validatorstars35 - A Java-based GTFS validator based on the OneBusAway GTFS Modules, runs in Java and is faster than the Google provided one.
• Conveyal's gtfs-libstars38 - Conveyal's successor to their own gtfs-validatorstars35, a Java-based library for loading and saving GTFS feeds of arbitrary size with disk-backed storage.
• Google's feedValidator - Google-supported Python-based GTFS validator.
• GTFS Meta-Validator (hosted by Omni) - A web-based GTFS validator that runs both the Google Python feedValidator and Conveyal's gtfs-validatorstars35 on uploaded GTFS files.

• gtfs-validator-apistars1 - This Python package is a thin wrapper around MobilityData/gtfs-validatorstars40 that handles intermediate files produced and finds gtfs-validator's output file so it can be given a specific name or returned as a string.
• MobilityData's gtfs-validatorstars40 - A open-source GTFS validator canonically following the GTFS spec implemented in Java licensed under Apache v2.0 maintained by MobilityData.
• Reflect GTFS Validator (hosted by Foursquare ITP) - Transit schedule and GTFS validation platform by Foursquare ITP that includes a free, web-based GTFS validator based on gtfs-libstars38.
• GForge — Project Management & Issue Tracking toolset for complex projects with self-premises and SaaS options. SaaS free plan offers first 5 users free & free for Open Source Projects.

• Paiza — Develop Web apps in Browser without having the need to setup anything. Free Plan offers 1 server with 24 hours lifetime and 4 hours running time per day with 2 CPU cores, 2 GB RAM and 1 GB storage.
• yqstars3.9k - yq is a portable command-line YAML processor
• shfmtstars3.7k - A shell parser, formatter, and interpreter with bash support; includes shfmt

• Wemvula - A visual transformation platform that provides the situational awareness to make sense of your interconnected web of needs, ideas, service components, supply contracts and change activities.
• Testing JavaScript Applications - A complete guide for JavaScript testing tools and techniques.
• comtryastars108 - Configuration management for localhost, written in Rust, for Linux, BSD, macOS, and Windows

• @adamdehaven/vue-custom-tooltipstars5 - Vue 2 & 3 🎉 customizable, reactive, and reusable tooltip component that supports plugin options, props, and multiple use-cases. Also works with SSR (e.g. VuePress, Nuxt) and includes TypeScript types. (Vue 3 is available on next branch/npm tag)
• DFIRTrackstars271 - Incident Response tracking application handling one or more incidents via cases and tasks with a lot of affected systems and artifacts.
• Writing an MCMC sampler in JAX by Jeremie Coullon - Tutorial on the different ways to write an MCMC sampler in JAX along with speed benchmarks.
• How to add a progress bar to JAX scans and loops by Jeremie Coullon - Tutorial on how to add a progress bar to compiled loops in JAX using the host_callback module.

• atuinstars793 - Replaces your existing shell history with a SQLite database, and records additional context for your commands. Additionally, it provides optional and fully encrypted synchronisation of your history between machines, via an Atuin server.
• cmdtimestars0 - Displays the duration of a command to the terminal forked from the timer plugin.

• nTask — Project management software that enables your teams tn collaborate, plan, analyze and manage everyday tasks. Basic Plan free forever with 100 MB storage, 5 users/team. Unlimited workspaces, meetings,tasks, timesheets and issue tracking.
• Storj — Decentralised Private Cloud Storage for Apps and Developers. Free plan provides 3 Projects, 50 GB storage per project/month , 50 GB bandwidth per project/month.
• starship - Fast, customisable, cross-shell prompt written in rust
• bpytopstars6.7k - Linux/OSX/FreeBSD resource monitor
• pass - Manage passwords from the command line with GPG encryption and optional git integration.
• powershell a cross-platform task automation and configuration management framework, consisting of a command-line shell and scripting language
• prettypingstars953 - Making the output of ping prettier, more colorful, more compact, and easier to read.
• Shell Field Guide
• juststars2.8k - Task runner for saving and running project-specific commands.
• ngsstars882 - Fully featured scripting language created specifically for Ops. REPL is being developed.
• getoptionsstars95 - An elegant option parser for shell scripts (sh, bash and all POSIX shells)
• pcalcstars140 - Calculator made for programmers working with multiple number representations, sizes, and overall close to the bits.
• bashewstars60 - bash script creator - from small stand-alone script to complex projects with CI/CD and testing

• What’s the difference between JavaScript and ECMAScript? - Clears the confusion about ES6 and Javascript.
• ECC - Public-key cryptosystems based on the algebraic structure of elliptic curves over finite fields.

• RSA - One of the first practical public-key cryptosystems and is widely used for secure data transmission. In RSA, this asymmetry is based on the practical difficulty of factoring the product of two large prime numbers, the factoring problem.
• Cryptocurrencies Dashboard - A dashboard of most active cryptocurrencies discussed on Reddit.
